name: stock_quote
description: Get real-time stock quote with price, change, volume, market cap, P/E ratio, EPS, and dividend yield for a given ticker symbol.

symbol.description: Stock ticker symbol (e.g. AAPL, TSLA, MSFT)

name: stock_history
description: Get historical OHLCV (Open/High/Low/Close/Volume) price data with summary statistics including total change, period high/low, and average volume.

symbol.description: Stock ticker symbol (e.g. AAPL, TSLA, MSFT)

name: stock_compare
description: Compare multiple stocks side by side showing price, change%, P/E ratio, market cap, and analyst recommendation for each.

symbols.description: Array of stock ticker symbols to compare (max 5). E.g. ["AAPL", "MSFT", "GOOGL"]

name: financial_news
description: Get the latest financial news articles for a stock including title, publisher, date, and URL.

symbol.description: Stock ticker symbol (e.g. AAPL, TSLA, MSFT)

count.description: Number of articles to return (1-10). Default: 5

name: stock_analysis
description: Get comprehensive fundamental analysis including valuation metrics (P/E, PEG, EV/EBITDA), profitability (margins, ROE, ROA), growth rates, financial health (debt/equity, current ratio), and analyst consensus targets.

symbol.description: Stock ticker symbol (e.g. AAPL, TSLA, MSFT)

name: options_chain
description: Get options chain data (strike, last price, bid, ask, volume, open interest, implied volatility) for the nearest expiry date.

symbol.description: Stock ticker symbol (e.g. AAPL, TSLA, MSFT)
